feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Shape of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,494Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 2

Summary: Arthur has always trusted Merlin—just not for the reasons Merlin thinks. When Camelot’s peace fractures and something ancient begins to stir, secrets long held in silence begin to surface… and not all of them belong to Merlin.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,927Chapters: 23/24Kudos: 204

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Geralt z Rivii | Geralt of Rivia/Jaskier | Dandelion

entry.title: The Pendragons' Time Travel
entry.summary:
Author: KiaLecterGraham

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,391Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Magic was restored to the Kingdom of Camelot, and Arthur Pendragon, now King of Camelot, is married to the man who has always been the love of his life: Merlin. Everything was going well until one thing led to another, and now Pendragon's four children travel back in time to their parents' past. The downside of being in the past? Having to hide their magic and seeing that their parents are still not together.

entry.title: The Paper King
entry.summary:
Author: HerMajestyofLichtenstein

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,715Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 157

Summary: As Camelot stands on the brink of a new reign, the future has never been more uncertain. After the death of Uther, Arthur is poised to take the throne. However, heavy is the head that wears the crown. With the Council’s ultimatum looming large, his own advisors quietly manoeuvre for power in the shadows. Merlin can no longer hide behind the anonymity of a servant. With his magic exposed, he is thrust into the heart of court politics and responsibility. Protecting Arthur is no longer his only duty, and his people need him more than ever. In a realm on the edge of change, can they find balance in their new roles, or will the weight of the crown and the cost of magic tear Camelot apart?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: if you are justice, please do not lie
entry.summary:
Author: daseydaisy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,486Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: “Can I help you?” The man shoved past him, not even the slightest bit put off by the biosteel onesie in red and gold. He unlocked the purple door with a wave of his hand (that’s not right, Arthur’s brain insisted) and shoved it open. “Sorry, I just…” All the words he wanted to say died somewhere between his brain and his mouth. Everything felt wrong but his heart eased up for the first time since he woke up in the middle of what he assumed was a park with a head injury and no memories. He pulled in a deep breath, set his shoulders, and tried again. “I think I belong to you.” There was a tense moment where neither man breathed. Or Superhero Arthur gets amnesia and decides to crash on Merlin's couch while Merlin's doing his best to "save" the city.

entry.title: A home where you can cry
entry.summary:
Author: BlackCloak

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,804Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: None of it had been expected, yet it became an unbelievable reality. After a random afternoon, in the blink of an eye, Arthur took a step whose consequences he could not foresee. But for Merlin’s sake—and even for his own—it was all worth it.OrAbout the feeling of finding home, despite losing everything.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Merlin’s Purrfect Holiday
entry.summary:
Author: victorian_eve

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,086Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 70

Summary: Merlin felt pain surge through his body, his limbs felt as if they were shrinking in on themselves and mutating. He could feel his face twisting into something none human. Long black hair grew from his skin as he watched the world getting bigger and bigger and felt himself drown in a pile of fabrics that he slowly realised were his own clothes. The cold ion cuffs around his writs dropped with a thud becoming too big for him. Merlin looked down to see what should be hands were instead small furry black paws. Merlin let out a horrified yelp, but only became more horrified when what actually came out of his mouth was… “Meow” Or Morgause found out that Merlin is Emrys and decides to take revenge by turning Merlin into a Cat. Arthur is going mad without Merlin and Camelot is realising just how much work Merlin does. Meanwhile Merlin is finally getting a break and lounging around Camelot as a Cat and yet still manages to protect Arthur and Camelot from their enemies.

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,212Chapters: 56/67Kudos: 235

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: the dawn and dusk of halcyon summers
entry.summary:
Author: lancingalot

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,970Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Gwaine is perfectly happy drifting through exam season with his boyfriend and dear friends by his side. Life isn't totally figured out - is it ever? - but they're happy. Content and together and so very whole; and determined to hold onto that contentedness even as life comes knocking, and they start to quickly realise that they might all be destined for different paths.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,372Chapters: 59/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,074Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 80

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: can't hide from the family line
entry.summary:
Author: froachy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,870Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 44

Summary: When Arthur finds out about Gwaine and Percival's relationship, he exiles them. Merlin won't accept that his man crush hates gay people. All he wants is a place for people to exist freely - Arthur doesn't believe he can make it. Angst ensues.

entry.title: Waterfall
entry.summary:
Author: FallingLeaf1298

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,780Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: They found it there, in the woods. It was able to change destiny and fate itself. The interwoven golden strands becoming a more complicated web from the moment that they found it.

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 451,242Chapters: 94/100Kudos: 569

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.title: The Grey
entry.summary:
Author: diadoumenos

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,607Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 376

Summary: It was then that Merlin heard a Laugh. Chills prickled down his spine, and his heart stopped. It actually stopped in his chest – or skipped a beat... or five – because he felt it stutter back to life and pound like charging horses at the sound, because he knew that laugh. He knew it like he knew the gentle squeeze of Gaius’s hand on his shoulder, the loving press of his mother’s lips to his brow, and the ever-present whisper of magic along his fingertips. The sun disappeared the day Arthur died, exactly four months ago, and never returned. They called it: The Grey. A tale of loss, supernatural meddling, time travel, hidden identities, crazy twists, and love. (Not Season 5 compliant.)

entry.title: held close all the time
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,487Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Freya woke first. Not that she had needed sleep. Not anymore. Neither of them did, not truly—but there was something human in it. Something grounding. A rhythm carried over from a life that had required it.
